resultList.dtldesc: Presenting a luxurious 2 BHK penthouse for sale in Amarprakash Temple Waves, Kundrathur, Chennai. This vaastu-compliant penthouse features an ideal north-east facing orientation, offering abundant natural light and a harmonious living environment in a highly sought-after location.Property SpecificationsCovering a generous carpet area of 1,200 sq. ft., this penthouse is located on the 7th and top floor of a 7-storeyed building, providing stunning views and a sense of exclusivity. The penthouse is meticulously designed and furnished, featuring two comfortable bedrooms, each complemented by two Western-style bathroomsone attached to the master bedroom and one common bathroomboth equipped with geysers for your convenience. The living cum dining area is spacious and elegantly appointed, seamlessly connecting to a balcony attached to the hall, which offers a serene view of the surrounding landscape. The modular kitchen, complete with a chimney, is designed for modern living and includes a piped gas connection and an attached utility area. The interior is finished with high-quality vitrified tile flooring, adding a touch of sophistication throughout the home.Facilities Residents of this penthouse will enjoy a range of facilities and amenities designed to enhance their quality of life. The property includes open parking, ensuring ample space for vehicles. Water supply is reliable, with both borewell and corporation sources available. The building provides 100 power backup, ensuring uninterrupted comfort, and features a security guard and CCTV installations for enhanced safety. There are two lifts for easy access to your home.The amenities offered are extensive and cater to a variety of interests and needs. The complex includes a clubhouse, swimming pool, gymnasium, jogging and strolling track, and a kids play area. Additional features include waste disposal services, DTH television facilities, an RO water system, and fire sprinklers. For relaxation and socializing, there are coffee lounges, restaurants, and event spaces, as well as a dance studio and an indoor games room. The property also boasts a library, business centre, meditation area, and indoor squash and badminton courts, ensuring a comprehensive living experience.Locality Located in a well-connected area, the penthouse is conveniently situated near schools and hospitals within a km. Malls, supermarkets, banks, and ATMs are also nearby, providing all essential services within easy reach. Public transport is readily accessible, with the Tambaram Railway Station and the airport both approximately 10 km away, ensuring smooth connectivity to the rest of Chennai.

The flooring across the apartment is finished with durable vitrified tiles, and the property is between 5 to 10 years old, confirming its good condition as a resale transaction. It carries a Freehold type of ownership, ensuring a secure and straightforward purchase process.FacilitiesThe primary facility of this property is its ready-to-move status, allowing for immediate possession upon finalisation of the sale. Being an unfurnished unit, it is ready for bespoke interior design and fit-out. Essential infrastructure, such as water and electricity connections, are established, enabling comfortable modern living in this residential location.LocalityThe apartment is situated on Tilakar street in Nolambur, part of the Chennai West neighbourhood, known for its connectivity and community environment. The address is VGN 4 Tilakar street, Nolambur, and a prominent landmark nearby is the Jain Sundarban Apartment complex. Nolambur is a desirable area with a blend of residential housing and access to necessary services and transport links, making it a convenient and practical location for families.
